steps.title: Check current vllm setup
steps.description:
Verify your vllm version and configuration:
```bash
vllm version
```
This feature requires a working vllm installation.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [New Model]: Qwen2.5-VL
steps.description:
TODO:

To run this model before transformers 4.49 release, install transformers from source 
```pip install git+https://github.com/huggingface/transformers```

Co-authored-by: (UC Berkeley) (Qwen Team)

See the fix PR for details: linked PR
